title: How many days should a family keep for Ujjain?
shortDescription: Most families benefit from at least two or three days.
longDescription: Keep two days for a focused Ujjain visit and three or more if adding Omkareshwar, rest windows or crowd buffers. Kumbh-period plans should remain flexible.
idealDuration: 2–3 days for Ujjain; longer for nearby circuits.
question: How many days should a family keep for Ujjain?
answer: Keep at least two days for a focused visit and add a third day for rest, crowd buffers or a nearby temple circuit.

title: Should we stay in Ujjain or Indore with parents?
shortDescription: Ujjain reduces darshan travel; Indore offers broader hotels and airport access.
longDescription: Choose Ujjain when minimizing daily transfers matters most. Choose Indore when hotel choice, flights and food are stronger priorities and the group can manage an early transfer.
idealDuration: Decide before booking transport and darshan plans.
question: Should we stay in Ujjain or Indore with parents?
answer: Ujjain is usually easier for early darshan and shorter transfers. Indore offers wider hotel choice but requires commuting.

title: How should Bhasma Aarti be planned?
shortDescription: Use only official temple sources and verify current rules.
longDescription: Availability, identity requirements, dress rules and reporting guidance may change. Do not rely on old timings or unofficial agents.
idealDuration: Keep the early-morning period free and verify reporting guidance.
question: How should Bhasma Aarti be planned?
answer: Use only official Mahakaleshwar temple sources and verify current booking, ID, dress and reporting rules before travel.

title: Are travel times reliable during Kumbh?
shortDescription: Treat every travel time as a planning estimate.
longDescription: Road diversions, shuttle arrangements and crowd controls can materially change transfer times. Keep generous buffers and follow official advisories.
idealDuration: Add a flexible buffer to every transfer.
question: Are travel times reliable during Kumbh?
answer: No estimate is guaranteed. Major dates can bring diversions and delays, so use live official guidance and keep generous buffers.
